unions.name: Msg
unions.comment: The message type for the frontend.

aliases.type: { terminateAll : {} -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg, fromBackend : ({ index : Basics.Int, data : Codec.Value } -> msg) -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg, toBackend : { index : Basics.Int, data : Codec.Value } -> Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg }

name: FastBenchmark.Types

unions.name: ToBackend
unions.comment: Message that gets sent to the backend.

unions.name: ToFrontend
unions.comment: Message that gets sent to the frontend.
cases: { timeout : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float, params : List.List (FastBenchmark.Types.Param graph function) }

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment: All the information needed to run a benchmark.
aliases.type: { graphToString : graph -> String.String, graphCodec : Codec.Codec graph, functionToString : function -> String.String, functionCodec : Codec.Codec function, graphs : List.List graph, functions : List.List function, sizes : List.List Basics.Int, toFunction : FastBenchmark.Types.Param graph function -> () -> (), timeout : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Float }

aliases.name: Param
aliases.comment: Parameters needed to measure the timing.
aliases.type: { graph : graph, function : function, size : Basics.Int }

aliases.name: Stats
aliases.type: { firstQuartile : Basics.Float, median : Basics.Float, thirdQuartile : Basics.Float, max : Basics.Float, min : Basics.Float, outliers : List.List Basics.Float }

values.name: toFrontendCodec
